summary: ScanSavvy onboarding flow bug fixes verified. All 15 features tested and working correctly. CRITICAL: Step 2 starts with ZERO stores selected on fresh state (no pre-selection). Step 3 notification options with conditional inputs working correctly. Full flow completes successfully and navigates to Dashboard.

critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Step 2 no longer auto-selects stores on fresh state - selectedStores starts as empty array
Step 3 notification options now show conditional inputs: Phone input for SMS, email confirmation for Email, push hint for Push
Summary section (YOUR SETUP) displays user's choices before completing flow
MVP fallback implemented - if API fails, saves to localStorage and navigates to /bundle page
test_credentials: name='Test User', email='test@example.com' (no auth required - clear localStorage first)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing store data from API/defaults
context_for_next_testing_agent: ScanSavvy onboarding flow fully tested with all bug fixes verified: (1) Step 2 starts with ZERO stores pre-selected on fresh state, (2) Store selection/deselection works via cards and search, (3) Selected stores show as pills with X remove buttons, (4) Continue button updates dynamically, (5) Step 3 notification options show conditional inputs (phone for SMS, email confirm for Email, push hint for Push), (6) Summary section shows user choices, (7) Get My Coupons button completes flow to Dashboard with QR code visible. Mobile responsiveness verified. No console errors.
